activation_results.reason: Input is verbatim the skill description, the canonical use case.
Swapping Create for Build keeps the intent of creating/auditing a GTM container baseline.
Direct invocation by skill name should activate it.
SSH key forwarding is unrelated to GTM container setup.
A meta question about skills does not match GTM container work.

criterion_results.text: Australian English used throughout the narrative (colour, optimise, behaviour, organise)
criterion_results.evidence: Uses 'rationalising' and Australian context (koalahomewares.com.au, Australian homewares retailer); no American spellings detected.

criterion_results.text: Artefact is a complete, runnable specification — not a placeholder
criterion_results.evidence: Includes concrete container_id, version_id, named tags/triggers/variables, preview URL and step-by-step verification — no TBDs.
Contains Summary, Baseline status, Changes applied (Variables/Triggers/Tags created, renamed, deleted), Preview & verification, and Recommended next steps.

judge_result.notes: The example artefact is a fully specified GTM baseline change log with concrete IDs, named entities, a verifiable preview URL, and clear next-step handoffs. Australian English and context are consistent throughout, and all canonical sections expected of a GTM setup report are present.
